name: project

scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=@sangtae-js && npm run build --workspace=@sangtae-react && npm run build --workspace=@sangtae-vue
scripts.preview:sample-app-react: npm run build --workspace=sample-app-react && npm run preview --workspace=sample-app-react
scripts.preview:sample-app-vue: npm run build --workspace=sample-app-vue && npm run preview --workspace=sample-app-vue

author: foreverchoi0706
description: Monorepo for sangtae-js state management library
